sources.title: Tử Vi Đẩu Số Tân Biên
sources.author: Vân Đằng Thái Thứ Lang
sources.locator: Unknown — no verified edition/page on hand; cited only from general domain familiarity with this widely-referenced Vietnamese Tử Vi text, not from a checked copy.
allowedUsage: naming a widely-known school reference point for later human verification
prohibitedUsage: citing a specific page/chapter/edition without independent verification
sources.notes: This same title appears in research/major-fortune/sources/source-registry.json (SRC-MF-001) tagged sourceType classical_text with locator 'Unknown'. This V0.9 pack deliberately tags it lower-confidence (unverified-summary, not classical-text) per explicit instruction for this task — no verified copy was available to check locators against. See sources/source-review-log.md.

sources.title: General Lưu Niên (annual-flow) auxiliary-star doctrine as commonly taught in modern Vietnamese Tử Vi practice
sources.locator: Unknown — general domain-knowledge synthesis, not a single citable text; practice varies materially by teacher/school lineage.
allowedUsage: research-only background for star-domain-policy candidate rules
prohibitedUsage: school-specific attribution without a named text
sources.notes: Used only to frame candidate star-domain hypotheses (e.g. Lưu Đào Hoa → romance polarity) as engineering-hypothesis/disputed, never as classical.

sources.title: General Bác Sĩ 12-cycle (Trường Sinh) doctrine covering Đại Hao / Tiểu Hao / Phục Binh, as commonly described in Tử Vi pedagogy
sources.locator: Unknown — general domain-knowledge synthesis; the natal Bác Sĩ cycle itself is well-established, but its *annual* placement/reinterpretation is exactly the disputed point this pack researches.
allowedUsage: research-only background for unsupported-star-policy adjudication of Lưu Đại Hao / Lưu Tiểu Hao / Lưu Phục Binh
prohibitedUsage: asserting a specific annual placement formula
sources.notes: Confirms the natal cycle exists and is well-known; does NOT supply a verified annual placement rule, which is the actual blocker per SRC-AA-CORE-001.

sources.title: General Tuần / Triệt (void) doctrine as commonly described in Tử Vi pedagogy
allowedUsage: research-only background for unsupported-star-policy adjudication of Lưu Tuần / Lưu Triệt
prohibitedUsage: asserting a specific annual placement formula
sources.notes: Natal Tuần/Triệt void markers are well-established; an annual re-derivation of them is exactly the disputed, unverified point.
